response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack software engineer with web, mobile, and some embedded experience, but the role requires deep expertise in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware, GPU architecture, and hardware-software co-design. The resume shows no evidence of performance architecture work on AI hardware, deep learning workload optimization, or SIMD/MIMD experience. Background is fundamentally misaligned with a Principal Performance Architect position focused on cloud AI accelerators.
strengths: Long track record (15+ years) as a senior software developer
Some low-level/systems exposure via DLang, C/C++ at National Instruments, and embedded work
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, performance-sensitive systems at Sociomantic
concerns: No SoC/IP modeling, hardware design, or AI accelerator experience
No deep learning training/inference optimization or GPU architecture background
Education (BS in CS) with no demonstrated equivalent in hardware/performance architecture domain

key_factors.factor: Lack of SoC/AI accelerator hardware experience
